steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; update_option('blogname', 'Asteris Theme Demo'); update_option('blogdescription', 'A free WordPress + WooCommerce block theme — 14 product page templates'); update_option('woocommerce_store_address', 'Sample St'); update_option('woocommerce_store_city', 'Sydney'); update_option('woocommerce_default_country', 'AU:NSW'); update_option('woocommerce_currency', 'USD'); update_option('woocommerce_onboarding_profile', ['completed' => true, 'skipped' => true]); update_option('woocommerce_show_marketplace_suggestions', 'no');
